name: Bar-Cohen Natural Convection Benchmark
description: Vertical aluminum plate-fin heatsink per Bar-Cohen & Rohsenow (1984). Large heatsink with black anodized finish — radiation should contribute meaningfully.

provenance.source: Bar-Cohen, A. & Rohsenow, W.M. (1984). Thermally Optimum Spacing of Vertical Natural Convection Cooled Parallel Plates. ASME J. Heat Transfer, 106(1), 116-123.
provenance.notes: Representative example. Exact output values not tabulated in original paper; tolerance ranges reflect correlation-level uncertainty. R_sink range 0.5-3.0 K/W is generous to accommodate model differences.

notes: Uses explicit material properties (not a preset) since this is a literature benchmark. No TIM or junction resistance — isolated sink performance only.
